message.content:
근본문제해결 검증용 파이프라인 모니터링 테스트: README.md 맨 끝에 'Root Cause Fix Verification - 2026-06-20 (No Duplicate)' 추가. (Diff 포맷 대신 ≔[line]..[line] 포맷을 반드시 사용할 것)

[CRITICAL RULE] When using the 'edit' tool, you MUST use the ≔[line]..[line] line-range replacement format exactly as required by the tool. DO NOT use diff or block replacement formats. EXAMPLE:

src/app.ts
≔10..12
new content for line 10
new content for line 11
new content for line 12

DO NOT USE MARKDOWN CODE BLOCKS AROUND THE EDIT.

[CRITICAL RULE] If 'Edit rejected: changed on disk' occurs, you MUST use the 'read' tool to re-read the file to get the latest hash, and then retry the 'edit'.

[CRITICAL RULE] DO NOT use `git commit` or `git stash` to clean up your changes. Leave modified files as unstaged or staged so they can be collected.
